description: Papenmeier WiFi Baby Monitor Free & Lite before 2.02.2 allows remote attackers to obtain audio data via certain requests to TCP ports 8258 and 8257.
Claude Reasoning: Papenmeier WiFi Baby Monitor is a phone application that turns a general-purpose Android device into a baby monitor; the CPE is an application CPE with no accompanying hardware or firmware CPE. No dedicated embedded baby-monitor device is affected, so the device-class criterion is not met.
